# syncwheel

> Deterministic Git maintenance for PR stacks, integration branches, dedicated worktrees, and
> multi-agent repositories.

## Start Here

- README: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel#readme
- AI install handoff: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/install.md
- AI agent guide: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/AGENT.md
- AI agent docs: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/ai-agents.md

## Procedures

- Agent procedure: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/agent-procedure.md
- Core procedure: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/core-procedure.md
- Manifest tracking: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/manifest-tracking.md
- Workflow: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/workflow.md
- Branch model: https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel/blob/main/docs/branch-model.md

## Install Commands

```bash
uv tool install "git+https://github.com/NestDevLab/syncwheel"
syncwheel self status
agentwheel install github:NestDevLab/syncwheel --adapter codex --local --skill syncwheel
```
